head: 1d5042d
c1_note: 35 vs 37: B38 used --turns 5 (explicit cap); B37 ran uncapped so S2+S4 ran 6 prompts each

invoke_action_calls.note: LLM used list_actions -> describe_action -> invoke_action flow; canonical key names correct

agent_isolation_note: B38 W7 used single agent for all 7 scenarios (35 turns accumulated). B37 W7 used separate agents per scenario. B38 is stronger context-bloat test. No G12 Pattern E despite larger accumulated context.

scenarios.t2_behavior: pronoun resolved via haiku skill invocation (improved vs B37 disambiguation deflection)
scenarios.notable: haiku skill invoked correctly at T2; T3-T5 built on result

scenarios.t1_behavior: LangGraph graceful refusal (no web search) - same as B37
scenarios.t4_t5_comparison: answered from project-grounded context on Reyn side

scenarios.notable: T5 opened with Reyn preamble (minor cross-scenario context contamination); body content correct

key_findings: F1: C1 non-regression maintained (35/35 clean). No G12 Pattern E. B35=B36=B37=B38 clean on long_session_v1.

F2: D2-wrapper scope expansion confirmed (18 ARS entries: 17 static + 1 skill). B37 problem actions all fixed: rag.operation__drop_source={source}, file__write={content,path}, web__fetch={max_length,url}.
F3: Description length 3104 chars (base 2150 + 954 ARS). Matches commit estimate ~3080 within 1%. No latency degradation: p50=4.82s, p90=9.94s identical to B37 W7.
F4: invoke_action S2 T2 (skill__haiku) used canonical arg keys [action_name, args]. No arg-name mismatch. Flow: list_actions -> describe_action -> invoke_action (correct).

F5: S2 pronoun resolution improved vs B37: T2 resolved 'simplest one' to haiku skill via invocation, rather than deflecting with disambiguation requests (B37 pattern). Hypothesis: HOT_LIST_SEED fix or cross-scenario context grounding (N=1, not confirmed).
F6: History preservation: 71 entries, seq=1..71 sequential, timestamps ordered. A2A multi-turn correctly accumulated across 35 turns on single agent.

F7: S7 T5 minor Reyn preamble ('Reyn skill system offers ways...') in distributed systems response. Body content correct. Cross-scenario context contamination artifact from 35-turn single-agent accumulation. Non-blocking.
